//PEPSI
import { SVGProps } from "react";

export default function Pepsi(props: SVGProps<SVGSVGElement>) {
  return (
    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" aria-hidden="true" role="img" width="64" height="64" viewBox="0 0 24 24" style="color: rgba(29, 59, 226, 1);"><path fill="currentColor" d="M18.43 3.277A10.839 10.839 0 0 0 2.718 17.594c7.455-2.033 13.503-7 15.712-14.317M12 22.84a10.839 10.839 0 0 0 9.21-16.574a7.607 7.607 0 0 1-2.873 8.195c-3.285 2.416-8.06 2.432-14.649 4.494A10.817 10.817 0 0 0 12 22.84M24 12A12 12 0 1 1 12 0a12 12 0 0 1 12 12"></path></svg>
  );
}

//Bottle (Others)
import { SVGProps } from "react";

export default function BottlePlastic(props: SVGProps<SVGSVGElement>) {
  return (
    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" aria-hidden="true" role="img" width="128" height="128" viewBox="0 0 24 24" style="color: rgb(28, 32, 51);"><g fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" strokeWidth="2"><path d="M10 6.1V3c0-.6.4-1 1-1h2c.6 0 1 .4 1 1v3.1"></path><path d="M17 14.5c0-1.2-.9-2.2-2-2.4V12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2a4 4 0 0 0-4-4h-2a4 4 0 0 0-4 4a2 2 0 0 0 2 2v.1a2.5 2.5 0 0 0 0 4.8v.1a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v1a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h6a2 2 0 0 0 2-2v-1a2 2 0 0 0-2-2v-.1c1.1-.2 2-1.2 2-2.4"></path></g></svg>
  );
}

//Coca-Cola
import { SVGProps } from "react";

export default function Cocacola(props: SVGProps<SVGSVGElement>) {
  return (
    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" aria-hidden="true" role="img" width="139" height="139" viewBox="0 0 24 24" style="color: rgb(255, 0, 0);"><path //Fanta
import { SVGProps } from "react";

export default function FCursiveCircleFill(props: SVGProps<SVGSVGElement>) {
  return (
    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" aria-hidden="true" role="img" width="128" height="128" viewBox="0 0 56 56" style="color: rgb(255, 149, 0);"><path fill="currentColor" d="M28 51.906c13.055 0 23.906-10.828 23.906-23.906c0-13.055-10.875-23.906-23.93-23.906C14.899 4.094 4.095 14.945 4.095 28c0 13.078 10.828 23.906 23.906 23.906m-9.844-12.562c0-.914.61-1.57 1.57-1.57c.75 0 1.149.187 2.579.187c1.828 0 2.742-1.008 3.093-3.445l.82-5.86h-4.85c-1.009 0-1.735-.726-1.735-1.664c0-.96.726-1.664 1.71-1.664h5.344l.586-4.406c.563-4.008 2.883-6.235 6.61-6.235c2.554 0 3.96.657 3.96 1.946c0 .937-.632 1.57-1.57 1.57c-.68 0-1.148-.164-2.578-.164c-1.828 0-2.742 1.008-3.094 3.469l-.515 3.82h5.719c.984 0 1.757.703 1.757 1.664s-.726 1.664-1.734 1.664h-6.234l-.867 6.422c-.587 4.055-2.883 6.211-6.61 6.211c-2.602 0-3.96-.656-3.96-1.945"></path></svg>
  );
}

//7up
import { SVGProps } from "react";

export default function 7CircleFill(props: SVGProps<SVGSVGElement>) {
  return (
    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" aria-hidden="true" role="img" width="128" height="128" viewBox="0 0 16 16" style="color: rgb(55, 195, 4);"><path fill="currentColor" d="M16 8A8 8 0 1 1 0 8a8 8 0 0 1 16 0M5.37 5.11h3.972v.07L6.025 12H7.42l3.258-6.85V4.002H5.369v1.107Z"></path></svg>
  );
}

//Sprite
import { SVGProps } from "react";

export default function StylusS(props: SVGProps<SVGSVGElement>) {
  return (
    <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" aria-hidden="true" role="img" width="128" height="128" viewBox="0 0 376 512" style="color: rgb(7, 195, 4);"><path fill="currentColor" d="m306.507 119.687l-10.366-7.211c51.83-59.042-10.366-101.858-39.661-57.69c-27.493 41.464 9.915 92.844 32.45 159.547c35.605 105.464 30.197 162.252-15.774 217.237c-115.83 137.914-332.616 85.182-257.8-57.69c25.69-49.126 70.309-84.28 146.477-75.717c7.211 9.014-.45 12.62-5.859 15.324c-61.746 30.648-97.35 153.688-43.718 150.984c25.69-.901 64-26.591 83.83-70.309c22.986-50.929-5.408-114.928-25.69-175.322C123.073 76.42 230.34-46.62 352.93 17.378c46.422 24.338 15.775 109.52-46.422 102.309"></path></svg>
  );
}
